comments.author: IneshReddy249
comments.body:
Hi @yenuo26, could you share the printed text content is: / audio content is: output from the failing runs? Since the thinker samples greedily (temp=0, seed=42), the failure should be deterministic — seeing the actual output would tell us whether video features are being dropped entirely, or whether the model still describes the video but with wording that misses the "baby"/"book" keyword check.
I'm looking into this on a single H100 80GB in the meantime.

comments.author: amy-why-3459
comments.body:

That's great!

comments.author: yenuo26
comments.body:
> Hi [@yenuo26](https://github.com/yenuo26), could you share the printed text content is: / audio content is: output from the failing runs? Since the thinker samples greedily (temp=0, seed=42), the failure should be deterministic — seeing the actual output would tell us whether video features are being dropped entirely, or whether the model still describes the video but with wording that misses the "baby"/"book" keyword check.
> I'm looking into this on a single H100 80GB in the meantime.

After updating vllm-omni to the latest commit today, I can no longer reproduce this issue. If I encounter it again in testing over the next few days, I will promptly supplement the audio and text outputs.

comments.author: Gaohan123
comments.body: close as not occurred. I can reopen if needed.

title: [Bug]: H800, Local CI Fail, Qwen2.5-omni, tests/examples/online_serving/test_qwen2_5_omni.py, the returned text does not contain a video description.
